exercises.title: Basic Practice
exercises.description: Type these words: main har din subah jaldi uthkar exercise karta hoon

solution.code: main har din subah jaldi uthkar exercise karta hoon

exercises.title: Sentence Practice
exercises.description: Type each sentence without looking at the keyboard.

solution.code:
main har din subah jaldi uthkar exercise karta hoon
school mein humein bahut kuch seekhne ko milta hai
meri family mein char log hain
mujhe kitabein padhna bahut pasand hai
hum sab milkar kaam karte hain
aaj ka din bahut achha hai
mujhe apne desh par garv hai
humare ghar mein ek chhota bagicha hai
bahar mausam bahut achha hai
mujhe gaane sunna bahut pasand hai
